section: ARECO Schedule A: Assets and Unearned Income
layout_note: Typed attachment table, transposed spreadsheet layout: one asset per column, attribute labels down the left (EIF; SP, DC, JT; Stock Name; Ticker; Transaction; Value of Asset A-L + Spouse/DC; Type of Income; Amount of Income A-K + Spouse/DC). Selections are black-filled cells. Three asset columns on this page. The Blackrock column's Transaction cell is black-filled (no letter visible) and its value bucket is A: None.

uncertainties.read: Transaction cell black-filled (Blackrock Liq Municash Inst), no P/S/E letter visible
uncertainties.note: black-filled Transaction cell with value=None suggests the position was sold during the year, but no transaction letter is legible; recorded null
